query:
UPDATE customers 
SET registeredAt = STR_TO_DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."註冊時間"')), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL 
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."註冊時間"')) IS NOT NULL
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."註冊時間"')) != ''
  AND registeredAt IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute 
UPDATE customers 
SET registeredAt = STR_TO_DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."註冊時間"')), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL 
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."註冊時間"')) IS NOT NULL
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."註冊時間"')) != ''
  AND registeredAt IS NULL;
